patch.insert_text: - Continue clopidogrel 75 mg orally once daily (antiplatelet)
added_claims: Clopidogrel 75 mg orally once daily (antiplatelet) is continued

reasons: Evidence explicitly states clopidogrel 75 mg once daily as a blood thinner (antiplatelet), matching the added claim.
No existing mention of clopidogrel in the note; not redundant.
Medication continuation belongs in Assessment and Plan section.
